gold_change_reason: Added detection of compression formats (.tar.gz, .tar.bz2, .tgz, .tbz) to pass appropriate flags to tar, and directory creation if it does not exist.
covered_requirements: Increase computation complexity by requiring automatic detection of compression formats (.tar.gz, .tar.bz2, .tgz, .tbz) and creation of the target directory if it does not exist.
implementation_notes: Uses os.makedirs with exist_ok=True to create target directory.
Checks file extension to determine compression flag: .tar.gz or .tgz => -z, .tar.bz2 or .tbz => -j, otherwise no flag.
Builds tar command accordingly and calls check_call, raising GenipeError on failure.
assumptions: Only the specified compression formats need to be handled; other formats may cause an error.
The tar command is available on the system.
